raw_description:
Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, city views, and modern amenities including free WiFi, flat-screen TVs, and work desks.Wellness and Leisure:Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a sauna, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Additional amenities include a fitness room, steam room, and outdoor seating area.Dining Options:The hotel offers a restaurant and bar, serving continental, buffet, and halal breakfasts. A coffee shop and pool bar provide additional dining options.Convenient Location:Located in Taif, the hotel is 22 km from Ta'if Regional Airport. Nearby attractions include Jouri Mall (8 km) and King Fahad Garden (10 km). Free on-site private parking is available.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.3for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Warwick Al Taif Hotel. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free parking, Free WiFi.
